query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS auditLogs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('create', 'update', 'delete', 'restore') NOT NULL,
  tableName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  recordId INT NOT NULL,
  changes JSON,
  changesSummary TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent TEXT,
  INDEX auditLogs_userId_idx (userId),
  INDEX auditLogs_tableName_idx (tableName),
  INDEX auditLogs_recordId_idx (recordId),
  INDEX auditLogs_action_idx (action),
  INDEX auditLogs_createdAt_idx (createdAt),
  INDEX auditLogs_tableName_recordId_idx (tableName, recordId),
  CONSTRAINT auditLogs_userId_fk FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id)
);
command:

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  action ENUM('create', 'update', 'delete', 'restore') NOT NULL,
  tableName VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  recordId INT NOT NULL,
  changes JSON,
  changesSummary TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),

  INDEX auditLogs_userId_idx (userId),
  INDEX auditLogs_tableName_idx (tableName),
  INDEX auditLogs_recordId_idx (recordId),
  INDEX auditLogs_action_idx (action),
  INDEX auditLogs_createdAt_idx (createdAt),
  INDEX auditLogs_tableName_recordId_idx (tableName, recordId),
  CONSTRAINT auditLogs_userId_fk FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id)
);
